title: Living in Boulder vlog 5 - 7 - 2017: Alexandrian Library

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a brief vlog update from Boulder, explaining he is on a multi-week project to catalog and video all books from the Greco-Roman world for his website. He also mentions planning to sell his car, nearly doing a Google Hangout with someone others warned is racist, and then signs off to get back to work.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Excited and motivated; wants to make the full body of Greco-Roman literature feel accessible on his website
Committed to selling it regardless of current distractions

stances.topic: potential Google Hangout with someone accused of racism
stances.position: Skeptical of the accusation given the person is a Syrian Muslim, open to helping him

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday I was doing a bunch of books and today I'll do a bunch of books.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to do all of the Greco-Roman world every single book on my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I can make it seem like it's not that much information and remember all of it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I hope others will do the same as I am doing with the Greco-Roman books.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: This project of doing the Greco-Roman books will go on for like a month.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have to do a video of my van but maybe I'll do it later on today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm still kind of freaking out about my new project of the books because I'm making so much progress so quickly.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need to do the video soon but I am gonna sell a car no matter what.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have to do these books; that's all I'm gonna do.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm listening to him as well as I'm doing and I'm learning a lot.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I can't really remember which books I do.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I listen to bits and pieces of books; I don't listen to books all the way through.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was trying to do living today but I'm not pausing.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was gonna do a Hangout, Google Hangout with one of my friends, Siri, but he died.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: People are saying I shouldn't do the Hangout with Siri because he's racist.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Maybe I could make Siri not be racist.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Siri is like a Syrian Muslim, which is the last person who should be racist in America.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I don't really have anything to say anymore; I'm just gonna get to work now.
